title: Market trolley
abstract: A personal shopping cart, or trolley, to be used to transport purchased items, includes a wheeled base, a handle that extends and retracts, and multiple nesting bins or containers. The wheels and handle are such that the trolley can be easily pulled or pushed. The bins are attached to a frame allowing different vertical positions, enabling the bins to either nest into each other (for storage, minimizing its size), or to extend vertically for carrying merchandise. All bins, with the exception of the bottom bin, are removable from the frame.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A trolley, comprising: a base bin adapted for receiving articles therein; at least one additional bin movably mounted fol Â¬ loweririg into and out of said base bin along a vertical axis in a nesting fashion. 2. The trolley according to claim 1, wherein said at least one additional bin nests within said base bin so that a top edge of said additional bin is within close proximity of a top edge of said base bin, 3. The trolley according to claim 1, wherein said at least one additional bin nests within said base bin so that a top edge of said additional bin is flush with or lower than a top edge of said base bin, 4. The trolley according to claim 1, further comprising a frame vertically slidably mounting said at least one additional bin for controlled lowering of said additional bin i to and out of said base bin. 5. The trolley according to claim 4, wherein said frame further horizontally slidably mounts said at least one additional bin for horizontal extension and retraction of said additional bin relative to said frame. 6. The trolley according to claim 4, wherein said frame further rotationally mounts said at least one additional bin for rotation in a horizontal plane 

relative to said frame to allow access to the bin from above without being impeded by a bin above said at least one additional bin. 7. The trolley according to claim 1 wherein said frame mounts said at least one additional bin in a removable fashion, enabling said bin to be disengaged from said frame for removal. 8. The trolley according to claim 1, further comprising a cover member for covering said base bin and said at least one additional bin. 9. The trolley according to claim 8 wherein said cover comprises flexible side members. 10. A market trolley, comprising: a base bin for receiving articles therein; a frame cooperating with said base bin and collapsible into a portion of said base bin; and plural additional bins mounted to said frame, wherein said plural additional bins nest into said base bin and into one another when said frame is in a collapsed position. 11. The market trolley according to claim 10, wherein when said plural additional bins are nested into said base bin, upper peripheral edges of said plural additional bins are within close proximity of an upper peripheral edge of said base bin. 12. The market trolley according to claim 10, wherein when said plural additional bins are nested into said base bin, upper peripheral edges of said 

plural additional bins are flush with or positioned below an upper peripheral edge of said base bin. 13. The market trolley according to claim. 10, further comprising a handle member separate from said frame for allowing a user to push or pull the market trolley . 14. The market trolley according to claim 13, wherein said handle is adapted to collapse to a retracted position. 15. The market trolley according to claim 10, wherein at least one of said additional bins is mounted to said frame in a removable fashion, enabling said at. least one bin to be disengaged from said frame for removal . 16. The market trolley according to claim 10, wherein at least one of said, plural additional bins mounts to said frame for horizontal extension and retraction of said at least one additional bin relative to said frame. 17. The market trolley according to claim 10, further comprising wheels for enabling rolling of said trolley. 18. The market trolley according to claim 10, further comprising a cover member for covering said base bin and said at least one additional bin. 19. The market trolley according to claim 18, wherein said cover comprises flexible side members. 20. The market trolley according to claim 10 further comprising a rigid or semi-rigid top cover membe , 21. The trolley according to claim 1 further comprising a rigid or semi-rigid top cover member . 22. The market trolley according to claim 10, wherein said frame further rotationally mounts at least one of said plural additional bin for rotation in a horizontal plane relative to said frame to allow access to the at least one bin from above without being impeded by a bin above said at least one additional bin.
